text:
EXPLANATION: The cited source refers to the Open LLM Leaderboard, which is a real and well-known project hosted on Hugging Face. The discrepancy regarding authors arises because the project is maintained collectively by the Hugging Face team rather than being a formal academic paper with individual authors, and the cited individuals are recognized contributors to the platform.

LINK: https://huggingface.co/spaces/open-llm-leaderboard/open_llm_leaderboard
FOUND_TITLE: Open LLM Leaderboard
FOUND_AUTHORS: Hugging Face
FOUND_YEAR: 2024
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
